questions.question: What fabled highway passes through Amarillo, Flagstaff and Winona?
What TV detective worked at the Desert Inn in Las Vegas?
What three-word question did Time magazine ask on a 1966 cover, prompting a record number of readers to cancel subscriptions?
Who was the first president to sit on a toilet in the White House?
Who won each of golf's four Grand Slam tournaments at least three times?
What was Jean-Luc Pollard suffering from when he filed suit in Pollard v. Pollard, Pollard, Pollard, Pollard, Pollard and Pollard?
